narrative:
Precinct Concord Roxabell (precinct in Ross County) has 826 registered voters, with 58.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 30.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
